source: IUCN Red List Categories and Criteria summary used in project code
note: Maintain this file manually if project source documents change.

A.title: Population reduction
summary: Criterion A uses percentage population reduction over the relevant time window.
A2, A3 and A4 thresholds: CR ≥ 80%, EN ≥ 50%, VU ≥ 30%.

B.title: Geographic range
summary: Criterion B requires B1 (EOO) and/or B2 (AOO), plus at least 2 of 3 conditions: severe fragmentation or number of locations, continuing decline, or extreme fluctuations.
B1 EOO thresholds: CR < 100 km², EN < 5,000 km², VU < 20,000 km².
B2 AOO thresholds: CR < 10 km², EN < 500 km², VU < 2,000 km².
Typical number of locations thresholds: CR = 1, EN ≤ 5, VU ≤ 10.

fields.eoo: Criterion B1 EOO thresholds: CR < 100 km², EN < 5,000 km², VU < 20,000 km².
fields.aoo: Criterion B2 AOO thresholds: CR < 10 km², EN < 500 km², VU < 2,000 km².
fields.locations: Typical number of locations thresholds under Criterion B: CR = 1, EN ≤ 5, VU ≤ 10.

C.title: Small population size and decline
summary: Criterion C total mature-individual thresholds: CR < 250, EN < 2,500, VU < 10,000.
C1 continuing decline thresholds: CR 25% in 3 years or 1 generation, EN 20% in 5 years or 2 generations, VU 10% in 10 years or 3 generations.

D.title: Very small or restricted population
summary: Criterion D thresholds: CR < 50 mature individuals, EN < 250 mature individuals, VU D1 < 1,000 mature individuals.
Criterion D2 applies only to VU.

fields.mature_individuals: Criterion D thresholds: CR < 50 mature individuals, EN < 250 mature individuals, VU D1 < 1,000 mature individuals.
fields.d2: Criterion D2 thresholds: AOO < 20 km² or number of locations ≤ 5, with a plausible future threat that could drive the taxon to CR or EX in a very short time.

E.title: Quantitative analysis
summary: Criterion E extinction probability thresholds: CR ≥ 50% within 10 years or 3 generations (max 100 years), EN ≥ 20% within 20 years or 5 generations (max 100 years), VU ≥ 10% within 100 years.

fields.extinction_probability: Criterion E extinction probability thresholds: CR ≥ 50% within 10 years or 3 generations (max 100 years), EN ≥ 20% within 20 years or 5 generations (max 100 years), VU ≥ 10% within 100 years.
